description: Non-Euclidean mirror room using modular space repetition. Infinite reflections without actual ray bouncing.

operations.notes: Subtract room interior from solid space to create walls

example_prompts: create non-Euclidean mirror room using modular space repetition
build infinite recursive room with an object repeated in every cell
compose liminal surreal space using mod-based coordinate folding

screenshot_metadata.notes: mod(p, roomSize) - 0.5 * roomSize for coordinate wrapping. Add slight fog for depth.
